title: NGC 1924
summary: NGC 1924 is a barred spiral galaxy located around 143 million light-years away in the constellation Orion. NGC 1924 was discovered on October 5, 1785 by William Herschel. NGC 1924 is not known to have an Active galactic nucleus, and is not known to have much star-forming regions.
